title: Tales of the Third Age - Core
description: Core mod for all Tales of the Third Age Mods!
body: This mod is the core for the Tales of the Third Age family of mods and addons for the Middle Earth Mod by Jukos. It handles various server/client packet services, optimizations, and provides an API for our mods to share and assist in integrating with the Middle Earth Minecraft Mod. Without this many of my other mods would not function as it is a dependency of those mods and addons. For any questions or suggestions please visit our Discord.
